Event: Spring Festival 2026
Event Date: 01/03/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: T205
Centennial Shrub Totem

Once in a while, the unit silences 3 random enemy units for 2 sec. Silenced enemy units cannot use any abilities (except those granted by the equipped set). The unit also removes silence from 3 random allied units. After that, the totem's owner makes all silenced enemy units explode, dealing 162500 physical damage to them.

- Level 20
Once in a while, the unit silences 3 random enemy units for 3 sec. Silenced enemy units cannot use any abilities (except those granted by the equipped set). The unit also removes silence from 3 random allied units. After that, the totem's owner makes all silenced enemy units explode, dealing 325000 physical damage to them.

- Level 40
Once in a while, the unit silences 3 random enemy units for 4 sec. Silenced enemy units cannot use any abilities (except those granted by the equipped set). The unit also removes silence from 3 random allied units. After that, the totem's owner makes all silenced enemy units explode, dealing 650000 physical damage to them.

Requirements: 90
